items.title: ‘There’s a burning fire in my belly’: Anthony Gordon signs for Barcelona from Newcastle in £69.3m deal
items.summary: England winger commits to Spanish giants to 2031 ‘It is a dream come true to be part of this club’ Anthony Gordon has signed for Barcelona from Newcastle in a five-year deal believed to be worth £69.3m. Both clubs announced the move on Friday night, with the Spanish giants saying in a statement that

items.title: Man Utd want AC Milan winger Leao - Saturday's gossip
items.summary: Manchester United interested in AC Milan's Rafael Leao, while Manchester City face a fight to keep both Josko Gvardiol and Tijjani Reijnders.

items.title: From 'bling-bling' & disputes to unity: The transformation of PSG
items.summary: As Luis Enrique's PSG bid to defend their Champions League crown, European football expert Guillem Balague explores the club's transformation.

items.title: Falkirk sign teenager McGovern from Glenavon
items.summary: Winger Paul McGovern joins Falkirk from Glenavon on a three-year deal for an undisclosed fee.
